pageTitle: Explore our services and support | Dove Cottage
heroImageAlt: Smiling people in a calm, modern hospice day room
heroDescription: Browse everything Dove Cottage has to offer — from clinical and emotional support to ways you can get involved. Use the topics below to show one area, or start with all.

items.title: Carer & patient wellbeing sessions
items.excerpt: Holistic support for individuals and carers: relaxed Monday sessions to connect, take part in wellbeing activities, and access nursing and carer support.
items.imageAlt: A calm, supportive place to talk and learn together

items.title: Dementia home-sitting
items.excerpt: Trained volunteers keep people company at home so carers can take a much-needed break with peace of mind.
items.imageAlt: A friendly volunteer visiting someone at home

items.title: Bereavement support
items.excerpt: A listening ear, groups, and signposting for anyone affected by loss or preparing for a bereavement.
items.imageAlt: Countryside and sky after a storm, symbolising hope and reflection

items.title: Bereavement support group
items.excerpt: A safe, friendly and relaxed bereavement drop-in group led by fully-trained volunteers.
items.imageAlt: Countryside and sky after a storm, symbolising hope and reflection

items.title: Counselling
items.excerpt: Confidential one-to-one sessions with qualified counsellors for patients, family members, and unpaid carers.
items.imageAlt: A quiet, private conversation in a safe environment

items.title: Nursing care & medical advice
items.excerpt: Specialist input to help with symptoms, comfort, and questions about treatment alongside your clinical team.
items.imageAlt: Nursing and medical care in a day hospice setting

items.title: Wellbeing activities
items.excerpt: Group sessions, creativity, and gentle activities that bring people together in a home-from-home atmosphere.
items.imageAlt: People taking part in a group activity in the hospice

items.title: Complementary therapies
items.excerpt: Holistic support such as touch therapies and relaxation techniques to help with comfort and stress.
items.imageAlt: A peaceful therapy room

items.title: Therapy Bathing
items.excerpt: A dignified, soothing bathing service when everyday washing has become difficult at home.
items.imageAlt: A comfortable assisted bathing area

items.title: Spiritual & Chaplaincy support
items.excerpt: Space to talk about hope, meaning, and what matters to you, whatever your beliefs or background.
items.imageAlt: A quiet place for reflection

items.title: Transport
items.excerpt: Support getting to the hospice and related appointments where our volunteer drivers and vehicles can help.
items.imageAlt: A volunteer-driven accessible vehicle in the countryside

items.title: Support groups
items.excerpt: Peer support with others who understand; groups are developing — register interest via our contact form.
items.imageAlt: A small support group in conversation

items.title: Carer support group
items.excerpt: Connection, peer support and signposting for carers and people affected by palliative conditions.
items.imageAlt: People in a welcoming group conversation

items.title: Men's Shed
items.excerpt: A welcoming place for men to connect with others who understand and find peer support.
items.imageAlt: Men talking together in a supportive group setting

items.title: Our Team
items.excerpt: Meet the people who make Dove Cottage a welcoming, expert place: nursing, support staff, and volunteers.
items.imageAlt: The hospice care team

items.title: Our Facilities
items.excerpt: A short tour of our day hospice spaces, created to feel as warm and unhurried as home.
items.imageAlt: A bright, comfortable day room at the hospice

items.title: Hire Our Facilities
items.excerpt: Book our community spaces for meetings, training, and events when not in use for patient care.
items.imageAlt: A flexible event space in the building

items.title: Make a donation
items.excerpt: Every gift helps us keep our doors open: one-off, regular, and in-memory giving in a few simple steps.
items.imageAlt: People supported in our day hospice and community

items.title: Volunteer your time
items.excerpt: From day hospice to driving, shops, and events — we always need more friendly faces in the team.
items.imageAlt: Volunteers working together in support of the hospice

items.title: Leave a gift in your will
items.excerpt: A lasting way to back local care; we can help you find clear, practical information when you are ready.
items.imageAlt: A thoughtful, hopeful moment in nature

items.title: Fundraise for us
items.excerpt: Cakes, runs, and community fun — we are here to cheer you on and help your fundraiser succeed.
items.imageAlt: Community fundraising event in high spirits

items.title: Visit our shops
items.excerpt: Bottesford and more: pre-loved treasures, bargains, and every pound supporting patient care at home.
items.imageAlt: A welcoming charity shop front

items.title: Corporate partnerships
items.excerpt: Work with us on volunteering, awareness, and fundraising that does good for your team and the Vale.
items.imageAlt: A partnership meeting in a local workplace
